name: Wells Fargo Autograph® Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 20,000 bonus points when you spend $1,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening (worth $200 in travel).

earning_rates.notes: Earn 3x points on transit including trains, rideshare, and EV charging stations.
Earn 3x points on popular streaming services.
Earn 3x points on select phone plan purchases.
Earn 1 point per dollar on all other purchases.

other_benefits.name: Cell Phone Protection
other_benefits.description: Up to $600 protection against damage or theft when you pay your monthly cell phone bill with the Wells Fargo Autograph Card ($25 deductible).

other_benefits.name: Rental Car Coverage
other_benefits.description: Collision damage waiver coverage for rental cars.

other_benefits.name: Travel Emergency Services
other_benefits.description: Travel and emergency services including roadside dispatch.

other_benefits.name: My Wells Fargo Deals
other_benefits.description: Discounts in the form of statement credits at participating merchants.

other_benefits.name: Event Access
other_benefits.description: Access to exclusive concert and entertainment events via Autograph Card Exclusives.

other_benefits.name: 0% Intro APR
other_benefits.description: 0% intro APR for 12 months from account opening on purchases; ongoing APR 18.49%-28.49% Variable.

sources.notes: NerdWallet - Wells Fargo Autograph vs competitors review, Mar 2026.
The Points Guy - Wells Fargo Autograph named No-Annual-Fee Card of the Year 2026, Feb 2026.

notes: The Wells Fargo Autograph was named 'No-Annual-Fee Card of the Year' by The Points Guy for 2026. Wells Fargo has added airline and hotel transfer partners including Virgin Red. Card has no foreign transaction fees, making it a strong travel card.
